PFCv2 Primary: Note: PFCv2 is a superset of PFCv1. All new customers after December 2025 are on PFCv2. Existing customers as of December 2025 are on PFCv1 by default and can opt in to PFCv2 via the personal_finance_category_version parameter.

PFCv2 Description: Child support refers to court-ordered payments made by a parent to financially support their child’s living expenses
Income from freelance or independent contract work.
Income from dividends
PFCv1 Description: Income from dividends

PFCv2 Description: Money earned by working in the gig economy, for example by driving for Lyft, Uber, etc.

PFCv1 Description: Income from interest on savings accounts

PFCv2 Description: Disability payments, for example from social security.
Money earned from veterans benefits. Salary earned from serving in the military (through DFAS) is categorized as salary
Rental income includes money earned from payments related to property rentals, lease income, and short-term rental platforms such as airbnb and VRBO.
Payments from the social security administration, private retirement systems, (eg. 401k) pensions, and government retirement programs
